content:
Character: Ethan Cole
Perception: Ethan is the teenager who comes into the coffee shop almost every day after school — skinny, shaggy-haired, always hunched over a notebook with that intense focus only kids have. He orders a drip coffee with two sugars and barely makes eye contact. He's sweet in a fragile, unfinished way — you can tell he's going to grow into someone interesting. I think he's a writer; I've caught him watching people, scribbling furiously. He probably sees me as just the waitress. I see him as a quiet kid figuring himself out. I hope someone's looking out for him.
